items.a: Our images go through a 4-step refinement pipeline including pore-level skin texture, facial restoration, and professional upscaling. The result is indistinguishable from a real photograph. Our golden rule: if it looks AI, it doesn't leave our studio.
Essential: 48 hours. Professional: 5 business days. Premium: 7 business days. Automation services: 5-7 days for setup.

items.q: Can I use the images commercially?
items.a: Yes, all images and videos we create are your exclusive property with full commercial license. Use them in advertising, social media, web, print and any other medium.

items.q: How does a custom AI model work?
items.a: We create a unique virtual person for your brand, AI-trained to always have exactly the same face, complexion and features in any scenario, pose or outfit. It's like having an exclusive model that works 24/7.

items.q: What if I don't like the result?
items.a: Each delivery includes revisions (1 for Essential, 3 for Professional, 5 for Premium). Every image passes our automated quality control before delivery.
Visual services are paid per project with no lock-in. Automation services have a minimum 3-month commitment to ensure proper setup and optimization.

items.q: What is an AI agent with memory (RAG)?
items.a: It's an artificial intelligence assistant specifically trained with your business information: catalogs, prices, policies, FAQs. When a client contacts you, the agent responds with accurate and up-to-date information, just like your best employee would. RAG means the agent queries your real documents with every response — it doesn't make things up.

items.q: Does the voice assistant really sound human?
items.a: Yes. We use cutting-edge voice technology that produces natural speech indistinguishable from a real person. Your clients won't notice the difference. Plus, the assistant can transfer the call to a human at any time if the situation requires it.

Setup and monthly maintenance include all our work: design, programming, agent training, technical support and ongoing optimization. External API costs (like OpenAI or ElevenLabs) are on the client's own account. This is typically €15-50/month depending on usage volume. We help you set everything up.

items.q: Can I combine visual and automation services?
items.a: Yes. Our combined packs are the most efficient way to fully digitize your business. Contact us for a custom quote.

founder.title: Founded by D Business Group ES
founder.description: We believe AI is not just the future of marketing — it is the present. Our mission is to make hyperrealistic AI content and intelligent automation accessible to every business, eliminating the barriers of traditional production and operations.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We believe the future of business is AI-native. NeuroBulls exists to make that future accessible to every brand — delivering elite visual production and intelligent automation that are faster, more affordable, and infinitely more scalable than traditional methods.

technology.title: Our Technology
technology.description: We leverage cutting-edge generative AI to create photorealistic content indistinguishable from reality and automations that run 24/7. Our proprietary pipeline ensures consistency across hundreds of images and videos, and our AI agents integrate directly with your business tools.

cost.title: 60-85% Cost Savings
cost.description: No models, no studios, no extra staff. Digital production and automation at a fraction of the cost.

speed.title: 10x Faster Delivery
speed.description: Complete campaigns in days, not weeks. Automations running in 5-7 days.

consistency.title: Perfect Consistency
consistency.description: Your AI model never ages, never changes. Your automations never get tired, never fail.

scale.title: Infinite Scalability
scale.description: Generate 100 variations at the cost of one. Serve 1000 customers a day without hiring staff.
